title: Garlicky Indulgent Saudi-Arabian Lamb Agemono
description: A crispy and aromatic deep-fried lamb dish from Saudi Arabia, infused with the warmth of hojicha and the depth of garlic.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together lamb, hojicha powder, garlic, onion, ginger, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan or a deep fryer to 180°C.
In a separate bowl, mix together flour, eggs, and a pinch of salt.
Add the lamb mixture to the flour mixture and mix well.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small patties.
Dip each patty in the beaten eggs and then coat in Panko breadcrumbs.
Carefully place the coated patties in the hot oil and deep-fry for 4-5 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
Remove the agemono from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
